title: Seven Gifts from the Sleeping Mountain
synopsis: Luna the silver-grey tabby kitten arrives at a volcanic training ground just as seven mysterious gifts appear over a week, each one teaching her something new about working together with her fellow mountain climbers.

pages.text: The black sand was still warm from yesterday's practice. Luna stepped carefully across the volcanic rim. Her silver-grey paws left tiny prints. The mountain guides had all gone home. She was one day late for climbing camp. A small wrapped box sat on the training rope. It had her name on it.

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead walks across black volcanic sand. Steam rises gently from the ground. A small wrapped gift sits near climbing ropes. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Luna walking on warm volcanic sand toward a mysterious gift

pages.text: Luna opened the box. Inside was a tiny silver bell. It rang once when she touched it. The sound echoed around the sleeping volcano. Three other young climbers appeared from behind the rocks. They had been waiting. 'We're late too,' said a mountain goat named Petra. 'Good thing the mountain left us gifts.'

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead holds a tiny silver bell. A young mountain goat and two other animal climbers emerge from behind dark volcanic rocks. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Luna and three other young animal climbers meeting on the volcanic rim

pages.text: On Tuesday, Luna found a coil of golden rope. It was exactly the right length for four climbers. She shared it with Petra, Finn the fox, and Maya the marmot. They practiced tying knots together. The rope glowed softly in the volcanic mist. 'The mountain knows what we need,' Maya said quietly.

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead practices rope knots with a mountain goat, fox, and marmot on black volcanic sand. Golden rope glows between them. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Four young animals practicing with glowing rope on volcanic ground

pages.text: Wednesday brought a compass that pointed to courage instead of north. Luna held it while Petra led them up the first training cliff. The needle spun wildly when they argued about which path to take. It pointed straight ahead when they decided together. Finn laughed. 'Even the compass wants teamwork,' he said.

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead holds a spinning compass while climbing with three other young animals up a volcanic cliff face. The compass glows with magical light. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Luna holding a magical compass while climbing with her team

pages.text: Thursday's gift was four water bottles that never emptied. Friday brought mittens that gripped any surface. Saturday delivered a tent that set itself up. Each gift worked better when they shared it. The mountain seemed to purr like Luna when they helped each other climb.

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead and three other young animals share magical climbing gear around a self-setting tent. Volcanic steam rises gently around them. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: The four young climbers sharing magical gear around their campsite

pages.text: Luna's silver bell rang differently now. It chimed in harmony with her friends' laughter. They had missed the official camp. But they had found something better. They had found each other. The black sand felt warm under their paws. The sleeping volcano kept its gentle watch.

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead sits with three other young animals on warm black volcanic sand, all laughing together as the silver bell glows. The peaceful volcano rises behind them. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Four friends sitting together laughing on the volcanic rim at sunset

pages.text: Sunday morning brought the biggest surprise. No gift appeared. Luna felt disappointed until Maya pointed to the climbing wall. Four ropes hung there, ready for anyone to use. 'We're the seventh gift,' Petra realized. 'For the next late climbers who need a team.'

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead looks up at climbing ropes with three other young animals. Sunlight streams through volcanic mist, warming the black sand. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Four young animals looking up at climbing ropes in morning sunlight

pages.text: Luna rang her bell one last time on the rim. The sound carried across the sleeping volcano. It would guide other lost climbers to their team. Sometimes arriving at the wrong moment is exactly right. The mountain knew. It always knew. They headed home together, already planning tomorrow's climb.

illustration.description: A silver-grey tabby kitten with huge pale green eyes, fluffy cheeks, and a white star marking on her forehead rings a silver bell while walking with three other young animals along the volcanic rim. The bell's sound creates visible ripples in the air. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
illustration.alt: Luna ringing her bell as the four friends walk together along the volcanic rim

Seven small wrapped gifts float in the air around her. Cozy kitchen home, family cooking together, warm yellows oranges, steam and flour, aprons, everyday love moments, dining table, family gathering, homemade food.
coverPrompt.alt: Luna the kitten surrounded by floating gifts on volcanic sand

questions.question: Why was Luna late to climbing camp?
questions.explanation: Luna stepped onto the volcanic rim one day after climbing camp had ended.

questions.question: What was special about the compass?
questions.explanation: The compass pointed to courage instead of north, and worked best when the team agreed.

questions.question: How many gifts appeared over the week?
questions.explanation: Seven gifts appeared, with the team realizing they were the seventh gift for future climbers.

questions.question: What happened to Luna's bell by the end?
choices: It rang in harmony with laughter
questions.explanation: Luna's silver bell rang differently, chiming in harmony with her friends' laughter.

questions.question: What did the team realize they were?
questions.explanation: They realized they were the seventh gift, ready to help the next late climbers who needed a team.
